scoring_rules.rule: Give 1 point when the learner states the exact topic or problem area.
Give 1 point when the learner explains the learning situation or current obstacle.
Give 1 point when the learner clearly states the kind of help they want.

growth_levels.description: Can notice that a question is too vague.
Can improve at least one missing element in a question.
Can produce a clear question with specificity, context, and purpose.

feedback_templates.message: Your question got stronger because you named the exact topic.
Your question is clearer because it now explains the learning situation.
Your question is more useful because it says what kind of help you want.

result_message_rules.rule: Start by naming the strongest improvement in the learner's revised question.
Show a simple score out of 3 based on specificity, context, and purpose.
End with one actionable suggestion for the next revision.
